data.content: Removed all prompt-guidance functionality from docs, runtime packaging, and tests. Deleted PROMPT.md, PROMPT_BEATS.md, PROMPT_KNOTS.md template files. Stripped prompt-guidance check/fix from doctor.ts and all related tests from doctor-applyfix.test.ts, doctor.test.ts, and doctor-coverage.test.ts. Removed prompt-guidance references from README.md and audit docs. All 135 test files pass (1997 tests), TypeScript compiles clean. Branch: feat/strip-prompt-guidance-docs-tests
